name: Image batch resize (hourly)
description: Every hour, scan a folder for new images and produce 256×256 WebP thumbnails next to them.
prerequisites: image_edit writes to <Storage>/binary/image-edit/<timestamp>-<action>.<ext> — the prompt then moves results to the source folder with file_system.

defaultJob.name: Image batch resize
defaultJob.prompt: List every .jpg/.jpeg/.png in c:\temp\images that does NOT already have a sibling .thumb.webp. For each one: 1) call image_edit with action=resize, width=256, height=256, format=webp; 2) move the produced file from <Storage>/binary/image-edit/ next to the original as <name>.thumb.webp using file_system. Report counts at the end.
